passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Premonition
passiveAbilities.description: If an enemy character declares this model as a target of an action, you may interrupt the action to make a reaction step by discarding one energy. If you do, the enemy must complete the action if possible and may not choose a new target.

activeAbilities.name: Foresight
activeAbilities.description: Target Human gains +2 Arcane stat until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X: Target restores X+1 wounds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Blinding Powder
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X:  Reduce target's Melee and Arcane stats by 2X until the end of turn.
Catastrophe: This model loses all energy.

signatureMove.name: Gone in a puff...
signatureMove.endStepEffect: The enemy model has -2 Melee stay for the remainder of the turn. This model may move 4".
